_description: Agent-directed structural lint rules. Checked by lint-gate.js hook. These encode conventions that ESLint AST rules cannot express — file placement, import patterns, naming.

rules.message: Prefer named exports over default exports for grep-ability
Deep relative imports (3+ levels) are fragile — use path aliases instead
String.replace with $ in replacement interprets special sequences — use a function replacer: .replace(pattern, () => value)
JSON.stringify(undefined) returns undefined (not a string) — guard the input or use a fallback
Logic file without colocated test — consider adding {basename}.test.{ext}
Importing from barrel index file — prefer direct module imports for tree-shaking and clarity
